---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or an improvement to existing functionality
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ""
---

## Summary
<!-- One sentence describing the feature being requested. -->


## Affected Area
<!-- Select all that apply. -->
- [ ] Chat Navigation Tree Map
- [ ] Chatbox Branch Tracking
- [ ] Node Summarization / AI Integration
- [ ] UI / UX
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Other: ___

## Problem Statement
<!--
Describe the problem this feature addresses.
Focus on the user's pain point, not the solution.
Example: "When a chat session has more than 30 nodes, there is no way to filter by keyword, which makes locating a specific prompt time-consuming."
-->


## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe your proposed approach. Mockups, diagrams, or code snippets are welcome. -->


## Alternatives Considered
<!-- List any alternative approaches you evaluated and why you ruled them out. -->


## Scope Estimate
- [ ] Small  — isolated change, a few hours
- [ ] Medium — touches multiple components, 1–2 days
- [ ] Large  — architectural impact, 3+ days

## Related Issues / PRs
<!-- Use "Closes #XX" or "Related to #XX". -->


## Additional Context


---
For open-ended design discussion, consider opening a [Discussion](../../discussions) before filing this issue.
